## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added under `tests/` (or a justification why not)
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check mcp_rampart tests` is clean
- [ ] Public API additions are re-exported from `mcp_rampart/__init__.py`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the next version's `## [Unreleased]` section
- [ ] If this adds a new audit check or injection pattern, the README's
  detail tables are updated to match
